   180	// removeMetaPromptSection removes the meta-prompt section from content
   181	func (m *MetaPromptInjectorImpl) removeMetaPromptSection(content string) string {
   182		// Same algorithm as persona system (proven reliable)
   183		startIdx := strings.Index(content, MetaPromptStartMarker)
   184		if startIdx == -1 {
   185			return content // No section found
   186		}
   187	
   188		endIdx := strings.Index(content[startIdx:], MetaPromptEndMarker)
   189		if endIdx == -1 {
   190			// Malformed section - remove from start marker to end
   191			return strings.TrimSpace(content[:startIdx])
   192		}
   193	
   194		// Calculate absolute end index
   195		endIdx = startIdx + endIdx + len(MetaPromptEndMarker)
   196	
   197		// Remove the section
   198		before := strings.TrimRight(content[:startIdx], " \t\n")
   199		after := strings.TrimLeft(content[endIdx:], " \t\n")
   200	
   201		if before != "" && after != "" {
   202			return before + "\n\n" + after
   203		} else if before != "" {
   204			return before
   205		} else if after != "" {
   206			return after
   207		}
   208		return ""
   209	}

   211	// buildMetaPromptSection creates the meta-prompt section content
   212	func (m *MetaPromptInjectorImpl) buildMetaPromptSection(promptContent, sourcePath string) string {
   213		var sections []string
   214	
   215		sections = append(sections, MetaPromptStartMarker)
   216		sections = append(sections, fmt.Sprintf("<!-- Source: %s -->", sourcePath))
   217		sections = append(sections, promptContent)
   218		sections = append(sections, MetaPromptEndMarker)
   219	
   220		return strings.Join(sections, "\n")
